name: Fido's Favorite Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, pour boiling water over oatmeal and margarine. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Stir in milk, egg, sugar, bouillon, and cornmeal.
3. Add flour one cup at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Knead in the final half cup or more to make a stiff dough.
5. Pat or roll the dough to 1/2 inch thickness.
6. Cut into bone shapes and place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in an oven set to 325°F for 50 minutes.
